summary: Frontend-only verification of the new 'Our Clinic' gallery + About section photo swap. All targeted flows pass on desktop (1920x900) and mobile (390x844). All 5 /clinic-*.jpg assets serve HTTP 200 and render with naturalWidth>0. Gallery items gallery-item-0..4 present with expected src order. nav-gallery and mobile-nav-gallery scroll correctly to #gallery. About uses real storefront (/clinic-exterior.jpg) as main and /clinic-exam-1.jpg as inset; '10+ yrs' badge shown. Regression: all 5 nav links (about/services/doctor/gallery/location) scroll to their sections, both doctor cards render with Dr. Irma Khan 'accepting' text present, welcome modal opens and closes, header/footer logos load, and zero broken images (naturalWidth==0) anywhere on the page.
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery uses img.src as React key — acceptable since srcs are unique, but consider using a stable id.
Gallery images use loading='lazy' — fine for below-the-fold performance.
No a11y issues observed; images all have descriptive alt text.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery feature confirmed working. Verified via curl (5x HTTP 200) and Playwright (naturalWidth>0 on all 5 images). Tested testids: gallery-item-0..4 with srcs [/clinic-exterior.jpg, /clinic-exam-1.jpg, /clinic-hallway.jpg, /clinic-exam-2.jpg, /clinic-procedure.jpg]. nav-gallery/mobile-nav-gallery both functional. About section uses IMAGES.building=/clinic-exterior.jpg and inset /clinic-exam-1.jpg. When testing mobile menu, note welcome modal may block first-load interactions — press Escape or close via button before clicking mobile-menu-toggle.
